prompt: Create a hyper-realistic portrait photo of a miniature tiny doll-like young woman sitting cross-legged in the open palm of a giant realistic human hand, as if she is only a few inches tall. She wears a beautiful pastel dusty pink traditional pajama-style outfit with delicate embroidered lace trim on the neckline, cuffs, hem, and pants, plus matching soft slippers. Her long brown hair is styled naturally with a slight half-up volume at the crown, falling over both shoulders. Her arms are crossed confidently over her chest, and her posture is centered and compact in the palm. Add a second giant hand entering from the right, with thumb and index finger gently pinching or adjusting near the side of her head to emphasize scale. Cover the face with a plain centered square censor block in medium warm brown, leaving the hair, ears, outfit, body pose, and hands visible. Use shallow depth of field, macro photography realism, detailed skin texture and palm lines, soft warm lighting, and a nighttime blurred city skyline with colorful bokeh lights. Vertical composition, close-up framing, cinematic realism, no text, no watermark.
